'''Sorontill''' was one of the four continents on the planet [[Essowyn]]. It was located in the north-western hemisphere. The other three continents were [[Baslar]], [[Steltout]], and [[Macor]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'' {{1stm}}
